text:
- Update to 1.7

Important features include:
 - SASL support out of the box
 - UTF8 decoding of strings
 - LDIF support
 - config file support

Added file(s):
- files/patch-GNUmakefile.in

Port maintainer (Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
